event: The Globe Theatre opens in London.
First public film screening by the Lumière brothers.
Georges Méliès releases 'A Trip to the Moon'.
'The Great Train Robbery' is released.
First Hollywood film studio opens.
Charlie Chaplin's Little Tramp character debuts.
'The Birth of a Nation' is released.
First commercial radio broadcast in the US (KDKA).
'Nosferatu' is released.
Walt Disney Company is founded.
'The Jazz Singer', the first feature-length motion picture with synchronized dialogue, is released.
Mickey Mouse debuts in 'Steamboat Willie'.
The first Academy Awards ceremony is held.
The Motion Picture Production Code (Hays Code) is introduced.
Universal Pictures releases 'Dracula' starring Bela Lugosi.
'King Kong' is released.
First Technicolor feature film, 'Becky Sharp', is released.
'Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs' premieres.
Orson Welles broadcasts 'The War of the Worlds'.
'The Wizard of Oz' is released.
Bugs Bunny makes his official debut in 'A Wild Hare'.
'Citizen Kane' is released.
'Casablanca' premieres.
Cannes Film Festival is held for the first time.
The Tony Awards are held for the first time.
Ed Sullivan Show premieres on CBS.
The first Emmy Awards are presented.
'I Love Lucy' premieres on television.
'Singin' in the Rain' is released.
Playboy magazine publishes its first issue.
Godzilla makes his first appearance in film.
Disneyland opens in Anaheim, California.
Elvis Presley releases his debut album.
The first Grammy Awards are held.
The Twilight Zone premieres on television.
Alfred Hitchcock's 'Psycho' is released.
'West Side Story' film adaptation is released.
The first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', premieres.
'Doctor Who' debuts on BBC television.
The Beatles make their first appearance on The Ed Sullivan Show.
'The Sound of Music' is released in theaters.
'Star Trek' premieres on NBC.
The first Super Bowl is played.
'2001: A Space Odyssey' is released.
Woodstock Music & Art Fair is held.
Walt Disney World opens in Florida.
'The Godfather' is released.
'The Exorcist' is released.
Dungeons & Dragons is published.
'Jaws' becomes the first modern summer blockbuster.
The Muppet Show premieres.
'Star Wars' is released in theaters.
'Space Invaders' arcade game is released.
Sony releases the Walkman.
Pac-Man is released in arcades.
MTV launches on cable television.
Michael Jackson's 'Thriller' is released.
The Nintendo Entertainment System (Famicom) launches in Japan.
Apple's '1984' Macintosh commercial airs during Super Bowl XVIII.
Super Mario Bros. is released for the NES.
'The Phantom of the Opera' opens in London's West End.
'The Simpsons' debut as shorts on The Tracey Ullman Show.
The Game Boy is released by Nintendo.
'The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air' premieres.
Nirvana releases 'Nevermind'.
'Jurassic Park' makes pioneering use of CGI.
Sony PlayStation launches in Japan.
'Toy Story', the first entirely computer-animated feature film, is released.
'Pokemon Red and Green' are released in Japan.
'Titanic' is released.
'The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time' is released.
'The Matrix' is released in theaters.
The PlayStation 2 is released.
The first iPod is released by Apple.
'American Idol' debuts on Fox.
Steam digital distribution platform is launched by Valve.
'World of Warcraft' is released.
YouTube is launched.
The Nintendo Wii is released.
Netflix introduces streaming video.
'Iron Man' kicks off the Marvel Cinematic Universe.
'Avatar' is released and becomes the highest-grossing film of all time.
Instagram is launched.
'Game of Thrones' premieres on HBO.
'The Avengers' is released in theaters.
'Grand Theft Auto V' is released, breaking sales records.
Amazon acquires Twitch.
'Hamilton' premieres on Broadway.
'Pokemon Go' is released and becomes a global phenomenon.
The Nintendo Switch is released worldwide.
